info.name: Social Media Clone API
info.description:
Full API automation collection with pre-request scripts and test assertions. Import the matching environment file before running.

## Setup
1. Import this file and `Social_Media_Clone_ENV.postman_environment.json`
2. Activate the environment
3. Run the **Auth** folder first (it populates `USER_TOKEN`, `USERNAME`, `EMAIL`)
4. Optionally run **Admin** login to populate `ADMIN_TOKEN`
5. Run other folders in any order, or use Collection Runner for full regression

exec: // Global pre-request: attach Bearer token if available

item.name: 01 - Auth
item.description: User registration, login, logout flows. Automatically populates USER_TOKEN, USERNAME, EMAIL.

exec: // Generate a unique test user on every run
pm.test('Admin login skipped (404/401 - admin not seeded)', () => true);

item.name: 02 - Users & Profile
item.description: Profile retrieval, update, search, follow, block.

exec: // Target is self — should fail with 400

item.name: 03 - Posts
item.description: Create, read, delete posts; like/unlike; comments; feed.

item.name: 04 - Stories
item.description: Story create and feed. Requires multipart/form-data file upload.

item.name: 06 - Groups
item.description: Community group CRUD, membership, and moderation.

exec: // TARGET_USER must be set to a different user's username
// For self-DM testing, use same username (server may reject with 400)

item.name: 08 - Events
item.description: Group event creation, RSVP, and listing.

item.name: 09 - Reports & Moderation
item.description: Report a post or user for moderation.

exec: // Re-create a fresh post to report

item.name: 10 - Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints. Requires ADMIN_TOKEN. Run Admin Login first.
